title: dupatya pilulifera
intro: Dupatya pilulifera, also known as Indian gentian, is a plant species belonging to the family Gentianaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its bitter and astringent properties. The health benefits of Dupatya pilulifera include its ability to aid digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as an anti-diabetic agent. Herbal preparations of Dupatya pilulifera include teas, tinctures, and powders, often used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin problems.
